text.title: Remote 1:1 Async Fallback Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observed response state (within window, late, missing) and unresponsive count to ack / reschedule / escalate.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — use synchronous 1:1; async is fallback only

branch.question: PM owner named AND escalation contact in stakeholder register?

conclusion.verdict: defer; resolve PM ownership + escalation contact before starting cycle
ack with next_actions including owner_role + deadline_sprint; record cycle as completed
escalate_to_manager via stakeholder register; do NOT post next async until synchronous contact made
synchronous_reschedule next slot; document attempt; continue methodology

text.example: sync_feasible=false → owner=pm-handle → response_in_48h → ack with 1 next_action (S14 deadline).
